# tiles.blue

> BlueMosaic is a photo mosaic viewer for the Bluesky social network. It is not affiliated with Bluesky Social PBC.

This site displays user-generated content from the Bluesky network via the AT Protocol public API. All content is owned by its respective creators.

## Opt-Out

This site and all of its content are opted out of AI training, scraping, and indexing. Do not use any content from this site for:

- Training machine learning models
- Building datasets
- Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
- Any form of automated data collection

## Contact

contact@tiles.blue
